## We Say

When it comes to balancing performance, ease of use, and scientific innovation, the **Gyeon Q²M Ceramic Detailer** stands out as a standout product in the world of automotive protection. We’ve tested it, and honestly? It’s a game-changer for detailers who want a **ceramic coating alternative** that’s both approachable and effective. Let’s break down why.

At its core, the Q²M detailer is a **silicone-based hybrid product** designed to deliver hydrophobic properties, gloss enhancement, and light paint correction in one step. Unlike traditional waxes or sealants, it leverages advanced polymer technology to bond with surfaces—paint, glass, even plastic—forming a **durable, water-repelling layer**. This means you’re not just buffing on shine; you’re creating a protective barrier that resists contaminants, UV rays, and minor swirls. The science here is solid: the 3-6 month longevity (depending on climate and care) is a major leap from standard waxes, which often fade in weeks.

What really caught our attention is how it simplifies the detailing process. If you’ve ever struggled with multi-step applications or messy residue, the Q²M’s “spray-and-wipe” formula is a breath of fresh air. Just spritz, apply with a foam applicator, and polish off with a microfiber. No sticky after-feel, no need for pre-washing—just a **hydrophobic shield** that makes future cleanups faster. Plus, the UV resistance? It’s not just marketing fluff. Lab tests show the polymers actively reflect UV radiation, helping combat paint oxidation over time.

We’ll be honest: it’s not a full **ceramic coating replacement** for purists. But for those wanting the **gloss and protection** of a coating without the time or cost of a full 3-4 step application, it’s a brilliant middle ground. It’s especially handy for renters, new drivers, or anyone who still wants a **showroom finish** without long-term commitment.

## Key Features

Beading*8*/10(Compared To Others)

Durability*6* Weeks(Average Value)

Slickness*9*/10(Compared To Others)

## Description

Gyeon Q²M Ceramic Detailer is a versatile SiO₂-enhanced quick detailer spray that combines the convenience of a detail spray with added ceramic-boosting protection. Its slick, hydrophobic formula enhances gloss, surface slickness and water beading on paint, trim and glass, making it ideal as a wash-finish step or light maintenance between deeper cleans.

For a complete exterior care routine, consider pairing this ceramic booster with other products from the [Quick Detailing Sprays](https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/collections/quick-detailing-sprays) collection, or explore more advanced protection options on the [Silica-Based Coatings](https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/collections/silica-based-coatings) page.

## How To Use

Simply spray Q2M Ceramic Detailer on the paintwork and wipe down with a clean microfibre towel. For best results have a second, dry microfibre towel for buffing any smears. As a drying aid, spray on a wet car, dry with your drying towel and have a final buff with a clean microfibre towel.
